common.init_info: Initialize the audio system to start broadcasting or receiving data.

input.drop_hint: Drop file here or click to browse

toasts.file_too_large: File too large! Maximum is {max} KB.
toasts.text_too_large: Text too large! Maximum is {max} bytes.

guide.mic_error: Microphone access failed. Check browser permissions and retry.
guide.signal_loss: Signal lost. Data might be incomplete.
guide.high_error: High error rate detected. Check volume or distance.

tooltips.accepted: Total number of packets successfully received and accepted by the system.
tooltips.stall: Packets received but linearly dependent on existing ones, thus not contributing to rank increase. Probability of stall is 1/256^(k-r) in GF(256).
tooltips.dep: Linearly dependent packets waiting for other packets to increase the matrix rank.
tooltips.dup: Packets with duplicate sequence numbers. 16-bit sequence numbers (0-65535) may wrap around after 65,536 packets.
tooltips.crc: Packets that failed CRC check (data corruption due to noise or interference).
tooltips.parse: Packets that failed to parse (invalid format or structural error).
tooltips.inv_nbr: Packets that failed consistency check between neighboring packets.
tooltips.last_seq: Sequence number of the most recently received packet (-1 if none).
tooltips.last_rank_up: Sequence number of the packet that last increased the matrix rank (decoding progress indicator).

tooltips.avg: Average processing time per audio block (mean of all processed blocks).
tooltips.max: Maximum processing time per block (bottleneck indicator under peak load).
tooltips.last: Processing time of the most recent audio block.
tooltips.budget: Time budget allocated for one block (calculated from sample rate and buffer size).
tooltips.overrun: Number of times processing exceeded the budget (causes real-time dropouts and packet loss).
tooltips.input_rms: Root Mean Square of the input signal (0 is silence, higher is active signal).
tooltips.blocks: Total number of audio blocks processed by the decoder.

debug.label: Debug Mode
debug.desc: Show technical metrics and detailed logs

transmission.desc: Randomizes packet sequence numbers to improve transmission robustness
